summary: Iteration 27 - Circle Stamp Consistency Testing Complete. VERIFIED: Frontend Circle stamp preview on DocumentStampPage matches backend-generated PDF stamp. All required elements present and consistent: double borders, ★ TLS VERIFIED ★ badge, TSL logo, QR code, stamp ID, date, advocate name, SCAN TO VERIFY badge.

Circle shape selector clickable and shows checkmark when selected - PASS
Template 'My Circle Stamp' auto-applied on Circle selection - PASS
My Stamps page shows all 3 stamps configured (3/3) - PASS

Circle stamp editor accessible via Edit button - PASS
Document Details form fields accessible and fillable - PASS
Stamp Options shows 'My Circle Stamp' with 'circle' badge - PASS

context_for_next_testing_agent: Circle stamp visual consistency VERIFIED between frontend preview (DocumentStampPage.jsx:1344-1435, StampSettingsPage Live Preview) and backend PDF generation (server.py:577-666). Both use identical element order: TLS VERIFIED → TSL logo → QR Code → Stamp ID → Date → Advocate Name → SCAN TO VERIFY. All 3 stamp shapes (Rectangle, Circle, Oval) are configured and working. My Stamps is a separate page accessible from sidebar. Document stamping workflow works end-to-end.
